operating_state: Total net sales declined 3% to $383.3 billion in fiscal 2023, with foreign currency weakness accounting for more than the entire decrease. iPhone sales decreased 2% driven by lower non-Pro model performance offset by higher Pro model sales, while Mac sales declined 27% primarily from laptop weakness. Services revenue grew 9% across all business lines, partially offsetting product declines.
cost_structure: Total gross margin percentage improved to 44.1% from 43.3% despite lower absolute gross margin, with Products gross margin increasing to 36.5% from cost savings and favorable mix despite currency headwinds. Services gross margin percentage decreased to 70.8% from 71.7% due to higher service costs and currency impacts. Research and development expenses increased 14% driven by headcount expansion.
material_events: Company announced $90 billion share repurchase authorization in May 2023 and raised quarterly dividend to $0.24 per share, executing $76.6 billion in repurchases and paying $15.0 billion in dividends during fiscal 2023. Launched Apple Vision Pro spatial computer expected in early 2024, alongside new Mac products powered by M2 chips. Faces mandatory compliance with EU Digital Markets Act by March 2024 requiring App Store business model changes.
macro_exposures: Foreign currency weakness relative to the U.S. dollar created significant headwinds across all geographic segments, with particular impact in Europe, Greater China, and Japan. Operations face heightened exposure to U.S.-China trade tensions with potential for more severe restrictions given manufacturing concentration in China mainland. Global semiconductor shortages and component supply disruptions present ongoing procurement risks.
forward_outlook: Company expects gross margins to remain subject to volatility and downward pressure going forward, with management intending to increase dividends annually subject to Board approval. Apple Vision Pro spatial computer launch planned for early calendar 2024 represents entry into new product category. Management anticipates continued App Store business changes driven by regulatory requirements.
uncertainty_profile: Patent litigation exposure continues with cellular-enabled products facing multiple infringement claims seeking substantial damages and injunctions. Tax positions involve significant judgment in interpreting complex domestic and international tax laws including OECD global minimum tax proposals. Cybersecurity threats are escalating in frequency and sophistication with particular targeting risk due to high-profile status.
